subject: fix(themes): darken Forest light accent for WCAG 3:1 contrast
body:
Forest light accent #ca8a04 on #f0fdf4 background only achieved 2.81:1
contrast ratio, failing WCAG 3:1 minimum for UI elements. Darkened to
#a16207 which scores 4.76:1 — same gold used by Earth light variant.

Tags: themes, accessibility
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-variants
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_018wuGq47B845KqHWD9whWMK
title: darken Forest light accent for WCAG 3:1 contrast
